name: terminal-bridge
description: Terminal tools for Copilot Chat — runs commands directly in WSL/Linux via child_process, no MCP dependency

languageModelTools.name: terminal_fg_run
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Run a command synchronously and return stdout+stderr and exit code. Specify profile to target a specific host (local, WSL, or SSH remote). Omit profile to use 'default'.

cwd.description: Working directory (absolute path on target). Defaults to home directory.

profile.description: Profile name for execution target. Omit for default. Use terminal_profile_list to see available profiles.

languageModelTools.name: terminal_bg_launch
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Launch a background command via tmux. Returns immediately with a job_id. Use terminal_bg_status and terminal_bg_get_output to poll progress. Specify profile to target a specific host.

interactive.description: If true, start a persistent tmux session for interactive use

profile.description: Profile name for execution target. Omit for default.

languageModelTools.name: terminal_bg_status
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Check the status of a background job. Use the same profile that was used to launch the job.

job_id.description: The job ID returned by terminal_bg_launch

profile.description: Profile name (must match the profile used to launch the job)

languageModelTools.name: terminal_bg_get_output
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get the output log of a background job. Use the same profile that was used to launch the job.

job_id.description: The job ID returned by terminal_bg_launch

tail.description: Number of lines to return from end. -1 for all. Default 20.

profile.description: Profile name (must match the profile used to launch the job)

languageModelTools.name: terminal_bg_send_cmd
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Send a command to an interactive background job's tmux session. Use the same profile that was used to launch the job.

job_id.description: The job ID of an interactive background job

profile.description: Profile name (must match the profile used to launch the job)

languageModelTools.name: terminal_bg_exit
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Terminate a background job. Use the same profile that was used to launch the job.

timeout.description: Seconds to wait for graceful exit. Default 60.

profile.description: Profile name (must match the profile used to launch the job)

languageModelTools.name: terminal_bg_list_jobs
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List background jobs with optional filtering by status or age. Specify profile to list jobs on a specific host.

status_filter.description: Filter by status: running, completed, failed, closed, unknown, or all

age_secs.description: Only show jobs younger than this many seconds. -1 for all.

profile.description: Profile name for target host. Omit for default.

languageModelTools.name: terminal_profile_list
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List all configured terminal profiles with their types (local, wsl, ssh). Profiles are stored as JSON files in ~/.config/terminal-bridge/profiles/.

languageModelTools.name: terminal_profile_get
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get the full configuration of a named terminal profile.

languageModelTools.name: terminal_profile_set
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Create or update a terminal profile. Types: 'local' (bash), 'wsl' (Windows WSL), 'ssh' (remote via SSH). SSH profiles use the host's ~/.ssh/config for connection details.

host.description: SSH host or alias from ssh config

languageModelTools.name: terminal_profile_delete
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Delete a terminal profile by name.
